name: Beef with Asparagus
recipeIngredient: Boneless Sirloin, thinly sliced against the grain into pieces 2-in long
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the beef thoroughly with the marinade.
2. Marinate for 10 minutes.
3. Heat 1 1/2 tablespoons of peanut oil in a wok over high heat.
4. Stir-fry the beef until it is lightly browned, then remove from the wok and drain.
5. In the remaining oil, stir-fry the asparagus for a few seconds to coat it.
6. Add salt and chicken broth, then boil until the asparagus is tender-crisp (about 1 minute).
7. Add the beef back in and toss with the asparagus to combine.
8. Serve immediately.
